title: Item card and item view apps on mobile
excerpt:
Hi would it be possible for the item card view and the item view apps to work in the mobile app. 
Currently when you open an item view app on mobile it says not available on mobile on on desktop.

posts.author: alexHSM (Alex O'Connor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi would it be possible for the item card view and the item view apps to work in the mobile app.

Currently when you open an item view app on mobile it says not available on mobile on on desktop.

posts.author: nealb (Neal Bailey)
posts.cookedHtml:
I agree with this, for example we use a checklist app and you cannot view them on the Mobile app.

What is strange is for a moment last week I could see those apps and it was actually working well, I managed somehow to hack into it by searching for the task using the search everywhere, and then it was there, I thought it was a update, worked well also and I was super happy to see it

However, as soon as I closed my app and reopened it was gone

posts.author: FdL (Franck de Luca)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Alex,
To view the item card on the mobile ap, you simply need to click on the item itself and not on the bubble right to it. This brings you directly to the item card.
Hope this helps
Franck
